name: Release Notes v3.16.01 - POS and Back Office
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release will be available to all customers by 7th February 2023."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"New Features"}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"New Payment Type - Woolworths and TAGR"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfjXEAQ.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfjXEAQ.jpg","name":"everyday-market.png","embedType":"image","float":"none"}}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfjcEAA.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfjcEAA.jpg","name":"tagr.png","embedType":"image","float":"none"}}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We've added two new non-integrated Payment Types for you to allocate your payments against, making it easier to reconcile your transactions at the end of the day and allowing for more detailed reporting."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You'll find both the Woolworths and TAGR Payment Types available to enable within the Payment Type settings. Both are disabled by default. Click here for instructions on "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Configuring-Payment-Types","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"Configuring Payment Types"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Improvements"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Stock Holdings Report has been renamed to "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Stock-Holdings-Report","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"Style Holdings Report"}]},{"text":" to more accurately reflect the Report's intention of reporting on styles (products grouped by Manufacturer SKU)"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We've extended the length of the Description field of a product (when editing the product within a sale in POS) to make it easier to view more of the 255-character limit.\n"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfjhEAA.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppfjhEAA.jpg","name":"mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T190758.174.png","embedType":"image","float":"none"}}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Resolutions"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Resolved an issue with the End of Day Report to ensure it reconciles to the Sales Report for the same period"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Zip Integration Page now displays all Outlets"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"The Layby Balance Report no longer includes cancelled sales"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"On the Customer Tab in POS, when an alternative delivery address has been selected, the checkbox for \"Same As Billing\" will be automatically unticked"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Product Images can now be updated successfully, whereas in the past, it was reverting to the previous image after uploading a new one"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"We've updated the Tooltip for the Product Description when editing a product to reflect the increase of the maximum visible characters in POS from 60 to 255."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"After updating the quantity of an item in POS, users can now successfully select the Purchase Order on the Fulfilment tab to "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Allocate-Special-Orders-to-a-Purchase-Order","target":"_self","children":[{"text":"allocate a Special Order to a specific PO"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Resolved an issue where in certain circumstances, items added to Purchase Orders would not appear in the list of products immediately"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
